name: GetOTP
description: Start SMS OTP verification flows, validate submitted codes, and inspect the templates and sender IDs configured for a GetOTP account.

auth.hint: Create a GetOTP account, copy the API key from the GetOTP dashboard, and send it in the X-OTP-Key header.

tools.name: send_sms_otp
tools.description: Start an SMS OTP verification request for a phone number.

params.name: data
params.description: SMS verification object. Include channel set to sms, sender, phone with country code and digits only, template UUID, and exactly one of code_length or code; optional payload must be a string. Codes are numeric and 4 to 8 characters.

tools.name: verify_otp
tools.description: Check whether an OTP code is valid, optionally binding the check to its phone number.

params.name: code
params.description: OTP code sent to the user.

params.name: phone
params.description: Phone number used for the OTP request, including country code and digits only.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List message templates configured for the authenticated account.

params.name: filter[status]
params.description: Template status: COMPLETED, IN_PROCESS, or CANCELED.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of templates to return; defaults to 10 and has a maximum of 1000.

params.name: page_token
params.description: Token from a pagination link for the previous or next page.

tools.name: list_senders
tools.description: List custom sender IDs configured for the authenticated account.

params.name: filter[status]
params.description: Sender status: Pending, Available, Rejected, or Canceled.

params.name: page_size
params.description: Number of senders to return; defaults to 10 and has a maximum of 1000.

params.name: page_token
params.description: Token from a pagination link for the previous or next page.
